title: Ornamental Fan
description: Every time you play [blue]3[/blue] Attacks in a single turn, gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Tracks attacks played per turn (resets at start of each turn). Triggers block gain every 3 attacks played. Counter displays current attack count modulo 3, showing progress toward next trigger.
